executive_summary: First report in this series. 10 countries tracked. 2 Red (Croatia, Germany). 6 Amber. 1 Green (none yet achieved — all mature countries still Amber). 1 No Data (Singapore). Establishing baseline.

trends.insight: Red — e-reporting blocked. Ecosio has not delivered required sample payloads. March 20 regulatory deadline creates urgency.
Red — multiple P0 customer issues unresolved. Print templates, field mappings, and ingestion templates all need work.
Amber — established market but 20+ open issues across clients. Issue resolution velocity needs improvement.
Amber — accreditation in progress. PA-PA testing planning underway. Multiple external dependencies (AIFE, Actalis, ecosio).

predictions.prediction: Closest to Green. If support tickets continue trending down, could be first country to reach Green.
Stable Amber. Could reach Green after Unified API launch if customer feedback is positive.

coaching: This is the baseline report. Use it to track trajectory over time. Focus areas: (1) unblock Croatia and Germany from Red, (2) push KSA/Malaysia toward Green, (3) maintain Belgium issue resolution velocity.
10 countries across Post GA, Pre GA, and Upcoming stages creates resource allocation tension. Prioritize based on regulatory deadlines and customer impact.
risk_watch: Croatia March 20 deadline — external dependency on ecosio. No backup plan if they don't deliver.
Germany customer escalation risk — HID Global, SGK, K&S all have growing issue lists.
France AIFE dependency — government API reliability is unpredictable. Build buffer into timelines.
